query:
-- All provider submissions this month
SELECT 
  provider,
  COUNT(*) as submissions,
  SUM(estimatedCostUsd) as totalEstimatedCost,
  MIN(createdAt) as firstSubmission,
  MAX(createdAt) as lastSubmission
FROM providerJobLogs
WHERE createdAt >= '2026-05-01'
GROUP BY provider
ORDER BY totalEstimatedCost DESC;

-- Total this month
SELECT SUM(estimatedCostUsd) as totalCostMay FROM providerJobLogs WHERE createdAt >= '2026-05-01';

  MAX(createdAt) as lastSubmission
FROM providerJobLogs

-- Total this month
